title: MT Created Applied Energistics
description: Changing AE2 blocks and items to Created-like
body:
Changing the textures and visuals of the blocks and items within the mod to fit a steampunk aesthetic. The Applied Energistics mod is a networked storage system that allows players to store and access items in the game Minecraft. With these retextured visuals, players can fully immerse themselves in a steampunk-themed world while still enjoying the benefits of the Applied Energistics mod's advanced storage capabilities.

Below you can see examples of how it looks like in the game and compare. ![Compare](https://i.imgur.com/meCVWCE.png)

I did this for myself, but everyone can use any of them as they wish
